sections.title: Necklaces
sections: Themadhood's Necklace Collection is a curated assortment of handcrafted pieces designed to highlight form, symbolism, and simplicity. The collection includes a variety of pendant and chain designs, ranging from subtle everyday wear to more distinctive statement pieces. Some necklaces are grouped as themed sets, while others remain individual designs, creating a balance between cohesive collections and unique handcrafted expressions.

items.title: 22 Shell Necklace Collection
about: A collection of 22 Shell based necklaces grouped
description: This collection features handcrafted 22 Shell necklace variations, each offering a natural aesthetic with subtle design differences.

items.title: Arrow Dangle Necklace
about: A handcrafted necklace featuring a Arrow pendant.
description: A clean, elongated design that creates a subtle statement through its shape and movement.

items.title: Crescent Moon Necklace
about: A handcrafted necklace featuring a crescent moon inspired design.
description: A lightweight and understated piece that incorporates a classic crescent moon form into a wearable design.

items.title: Heart Cross Necklace
about: A handcrafted necklace featuring a combined heart and cross pendant.
The Heart-Cross pendant is custom made, giving each piece a distinct handcrafted character.
description: A symbolic design that blends heart and cross elements into a single form.
The custom-made pendant offers a balanced look that is both meaningful and refined.

items.title: Simple Washer Necklace
about: A minimalist necklace built around a washer-style centerpiece.
description: A clean and understated design that emphasizes simplicity and everyday versatility.
